archive.description:
Only completed or canceled
epics can be archived
archive.label: Archive Epic
archive.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to archive the epic? All your archived epics can be restored later.

success.label: Archive success
success.message: Your archives can be found in project archives.

failed.message: Epic could not be archived. Please try again.

general.title: Create an epic and assign it to someone, even yourself
general.description: For larger bodies of work that span several cycles and can live across modules, create an epic. Link work items and sub-work items in a project to an epic and jump into a work item from the overview.

section.title: No epics yet
section.description: Start adding epics to manage and track the progress.

modal.description1: This creates a copy of the epic.
modal.description2: All property data will be removed while duplicating.
